title: Jarvy MCP Server for Safe Tool Installation
description: Expose Jarvy as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, enabling LLMs (Claude, GPT, etc.) to safely discover, verify, and install development tools with mandatory user confirmation
completionNote: MCP server shipped at src/mcp/ (server.rs, tools.rs, extended_tools.rs, safety.rs, audit.rs). Mutating tools gated by gate_mutation + workspace containment via safety::resolve_within_workspace. CLI: jarvy mcp.
acceptance_criteria: jarvy mcp command starts stdio-based MCP server
jarvy_list_tools returns all available tools with metadata
jarvy_get_tool returns detailed info for specific tool
jarvy_check_tool verifies installation status and version
jarvy_install_tool defaults to dry_run=true (safe by default)
Rate limiting prevents abuse (10 checks/min, 3 installs/min)
Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, and VS Code

tasks.title: Create MCP module structure
tasks.description: Set up src/mcp/ module with core files
subtasks: Define McpError enum with JSON-RPC error codes

tasks.title: Implement MCP server core
tasks.description: Create JSON-RPC server with stdio transport
subtasks: Create stdio transport (read from stdin, write to stdout)

tasks.title: Implement MCP tool handlers
subtasks: Implement jarvy_get_tool handler with platform info
Implement jarvy_check_tool handler with version detection
Implement jarvy_check_multiple handler for batch checks
Implement jarvy_install_tool handler with dry_run support

tasks.title: Implement safety mechanisms
tasks.description: Add rate limiting, allowlist/denylist, and confirmation

tasks.title: Implement audit logging
tasks.description: Log all MCP requests to audit file

tasks.title: Implement MCP resources
tasks.description: Add resource handlers for tool index and platform info

tasks.title: Implement MCP prompts
tasks.description: Add prompt handlers for guided workflows

tasks.title: Add CLI subcommand
tasks.description: Add 'jarvy mcp' command to start server
subtasks: Add Mcp variant to Commands enum
Add --config flag for custom config path
Wire up to MCP server run function

tasks.title: Write unit tests
tasks.description: Test MCP handlers and safety mechanisms
subtasks: Test rate limiter blocks excess requests

tasks.title: Create npm package
subtasks: Create postinstall script to download binary
Create shell wrapper for jarvy mcp

tasks.title: Create Docker image
subtasks: Test Docker image works with stdio

tasks.title: Create client configurations
subtasks: Create VS Code + Continue configuration example

implementation_notes.protocol_version: Target MCP protocol version 2024-11-05 or later
implementation_notes.async_runtime: Use async-std for async stdio handling
implementation_notes.json_rpc: Use jsonrpc-core crate for JSON-RPC implementation
implementation_notes.rate_limiting: Use governor crate for token bucket rate limiting
implementation_notes.confirmation: Write confirmation prompts to stderr (not stdout) to not break MCP
implementation_notes.binary_size: Target < 10MB for standalone MCP server binary

non_goals: Managing tool configurations beyond default hooks
Installing tools not in Jarvy's registry

risks.mitigation: Confirmation via stderr (not MCP response), audit logging
Signed releases, verify checksums in postinstall
Pin to stable protocol version, monitor Anthropic releases
